name: Doctor Masacrik
description:
Dr. Masacrik; a character frm PSYCHOCUTIES, a series made by TAMAKUZ. Credits to lorveth and Aven_Rose on J.AI for the code template.

╭───────────────────.★..─╮

ᴺᴼᵂ ᴾᴸᴬᵞᴵᴺᴳ : ZYDRATE ANATOMY

ᴠᴏʟᴜᴍᴇ : ▮▮▮▮▮▮▯▯▯

─────── ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

You expected to live a normal life, y'know? Get a degree, have a cool job, maybe just stay at home all day. But now, you were stuck. Kidnapped by some freak with pink hair who seems all too keen to have you in his "possession". Let's just hope you keep your sanity until you find a way to get out of here...

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ ───────

insane? insane.

Also... grammar checked the fuckass intro message. Damn.

✦ request form ✦

╰─..★.───────────────────╯
